name: X-Golf Lincoln
address: 622 George Washington Hwy Unit 1, Lincoln, RI 02865
about: X-Golf Lincoln is an indoor golf facility equipped with 6 state-of-the-art golf simulators. The venue offers a comprehensive experience that combines practice, play, training, and entertainment. Each simulator is available for hourly rental, with prices varying by day and time. The facility also features a full-service restaurant and bar, on-site parking, and event spaces suitable for corporate gatherings and private parties. Golf lessons with PGA-certified instructors are available, and memberships are offered for those seeking more frequent access during the winter months.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators provide unparalleled accuracy and realism
Full bar and restaurant on-site for a complete social experience
PGA-certified coaching available to improve golf skills
Flexible membership options for dedicated winter practice
Accommodates groups up to 6 people per simulator bay

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen offering shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full liquor license and craft beer on tap

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental is available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. The facility has a full-service restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. Each additional person adds approximately one hour to the total time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome at X-Golf Lincoln.
